name: generate_qr_code
trigger_description: Generate a Workato-branded QR code as a base64-encoded PNG. The QR code is rendered with the Workato W logo centered, using the specified foreground color for both the QR modules and the logo. Inputs: url (required) — the URL to encode; fg_color (optional, default 'workato') — foreground color as a named preset (workato, dark, black, white) or hex string like #ff6600; bg_color (optional, default 'white') — background color as a named preset or hex string, use 'transparent' for PNG with alpha channel. Returns image_base64 (PNG), mime_type, width, height, url.
